title: Privacy & Compliance Shell (Notice, Export, Wipe)
description: Implement the privacy controls shell in entrypoints/options/ Privacy tab (or a dedicated options page if P2.1 not yet started). Required controls per compliance matrix: (1) View all stored data — JSON preview modal; (2) Export to JSON — triggers download of genome.json; (3) Secure data wipe — confirm dialog → overwrite all encrypted blobs → delete IndexedDB + chrome.storage entries; (4) Disable Deep Check toggle (blocked until Phase 2, but scaffold the UI). Privacy notice text visible within 1 click. Onboarding consent record stored and verified. TDD for export and wipe logic.
